GeishasRevengePayoutAndRulesShared.MultiplierReelFeature1: At the start of any main game spin, the multiplier windows on the left of reel 1 will be set as inactive.
GeishasRevengePayoutAndRulesShared.MultiplierReelFeature2: Any winning symbol in row 1, 2, 3, 4 and/or 5 of reel 1 will either activate the respective row's multiplier window (if the multiplier window is inactive) or increase the respective row's multiplier by x2 (if the multiplier window is active) after wins are paid.
GeishasRevengePayoutAndRulesShared.MultiplierReelFeature3: At the end of the spin, wins will be multiplied by the current total sum of the multipliers.
GeishasRevengePayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
GeishasRevengePayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the multiplier windows on the left of reel 1 will be set as inactive.
GeishasRevengePayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature3: At the end of every free spin, wins will be multiplied by the current total sum of the multipliers.
GeishasRevengePayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature4: The multiplier in the multiplier windows will remain until the end of Free Spins Feature.
GeishasRevengePayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMaxWinFeature1: The maximum win amount is %{5000}x of the bet amount.
GeishasRevengePayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMaxWinFeature2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{5000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.
GeishasRevengePayoutAndRulesShared.BodyWinWaysFeature1: Bet ways win if the winning symbols are in succession from the leftmost reel to the right.
GeishasRevengePayoutAndRulesShared.BodyWinWaysFeature2: Total number of winning bet ways for each symbol is calculated by multiplying the number of adjacent winning symbols for each symbol from the leftmost reel to the right.
GeishasRevengePayoutAndRulesShared.BodyWinWaysFeature3: The winning symbol payout is multiplied by the number of winning bet ways.
GeishasRevengePayoutAndRulesShared.BodyWinWaysFeature4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
GeishasRevengePayoutAndRulesShared.BodyWinWaysFeature5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
GeishasRevengePayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue1: Some symbols may occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces and each of these symbols will represent as a single symbol during payout calculations.
GeishasRevengePayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue2: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
GeishasRevengePayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue3: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.

GeishasRevengeRules.GeneralRules1: Geisha's Revenge is a 5-reels (5 individual rows in reel 1, 6 rows in reels 2, 3, 4, and 5) video slot featuring multiplier windows on the left side of the first reel.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{240} ways - %{6480} ways, bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.05 to 50.

GeishasRevengeRules.GeneralRules3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
